ingredients: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
Rye toast points (or crackers), for serving
steps: Mix cream cheese, capers, red onion, lemon zest and juice; season with salt and pepper.
Spread mixture on rye toast points or crackers.
Top with smoked salmon and serve.
tips: Smoked salmon saltiness varies; taste the spread before adding extra salt. Serve on low-salt crackers/toasts so the salmon stands out.

sources.title: Smoked Salmon With Cream Cheese, Capers, and Red Onion
